recent.statement: Severe thunderstorms will cause power outages in the Midwest US
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a widespread severe thunderstorm power outage event in the Midwest would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: Flash flooding in Albuquerque, New Mexico will disrupt at least 3 major highways
recent.evidence: No signal provides evidence of flash flooding disrupting three major highways in Albuquerque, and such a major event would have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: Natural gas futures (NG=F) will rise by 2.5-3.5% following the EIA weekly storage report release on July 23
recent.evidence: No signal reports NG=F price movement following the July 23 EIA storage report; S5 only references a future July 30 report, so the claimed 2.5-3.5% rise is unconfirmed.

recent.statement: The Strait of Hormuz will experience a significant increase in oil tanker traffic.
recent.evidence: Strait of Hormuz showed 15 daily transits, 30% below its 30-day average of 21, indicating a decrease rather than a significant increase in tanker traffic.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorm in Tampa, Florida disrupts air travel and causes power outages
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and an event this significant would certainly have been captured if it occurred.

recent.statement: Flash flood in Grand Junction, Colorado causes road closures and evacuations
recent.evidence: No signal provides any text showing a flash flood, road closures, or evacuations in Grand Junction, Colorado during the window.

recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in Colorado trigger 15% drop in agricultural commodity futures
recent.evidence: No signal shows Colorado flash flood warnings or a 15% drop in agricultural commodity futures; only FOMC schedules and unrelated market indices appear.

recent.statement: Ukraine warfronts will see increased artillery exchanges in eastern regions due to stalled ceasefire negotiations
recent.evidence: S1 only shows ongoing active frontlines as a general condition, not any increase in artillery exchanges or ceasefire negotiation context.

recent.statement: An earthquake will occur in the South Sandwich Islands with a magnitude above 6.0
recent.evidence: No signal's text reports any M6.0+ earthquake in the South Sandwich Islands during the window, though such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorm in Houston, Texas causes localized power outages
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, so there is no evidence the Houston thunderstorm or resulting power outages occurred within the window.

recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in New Mexico and Colorado will cause temporary disruptions to coal transportation infrastructure
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows flash flood warnings disrupting coal transportation infrastructure in New Mexico, and such an event would have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike near Tokyo in the next week
recent.evidence: No signal reports a major earthquake striking near Tokyo during the window, an event that would certainly have been captured.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
